ko.headline: Roland Siegwart: 35년에 걸쳐 442편, 총 35,579회 인용, h=92, 500+ 블록버스터 12편.
paragraphs: 1991년 "Manipulation with soft fingers: contact force control"으로 출발. 첫 500+ 인용 논문까지 13년 걸림: "Design and Control of an Indoor Micro Quadrotor" (2004, 828회). 1000+ 인용 논문: "PID vs LQ control techniques applied to an indoor micro quadrotor" (2004, 1,262회).
초기 토픽: Computer science, Controllability, Object (grammar). 최근 토픽: Computer science, Artificial intelligence, Robot. 피벗 점수 0.17 → 토픽 지속형.
최다 인용 논문 "The EuRoC micro aerial vehicle datasets" (2016, 1,958회) — 커리어 후기에 위치.
제자 후보 추정 122명 — 상위: Michael Blösch(2010~, 본인 마지막저자 17편), Nicola Tomatis(2000~, 본인 마지막저자 14편), Stephan Weiss(2010~, 본인 마지막저자 14편).
lessons: 지속성이 h-index를 만든다 — 한두 편의 블록버스터만으로는 여기 못 옴.
한 우물 깊게 파는 전략으로 임팩트 달성.
후기에 팀/랩 규모 확장 — 단독 연구자에서 리더로 전환.
122명 제자 후보 — 제자 배출이 임팩트의 실체.

en.headline: Roland Siegwart: over 35 years, 442 papers, 35,579 total cites, h=92, 12 blockbusters (500+ cites).
paragraphs: Started in 1991 with "Manipulation with soft fingers: contact force control". First 500+ cite paper came 13 years in: "Design and Control of an Indoor Micro Quadrotor" (2004, 828 cites). 1000+ cite paper: "PID vs LQ control techniques applied to an indoor micro quadrotor" (2004, 1,262 cites).
Early topics: Computer science, Controllability, Object (grammar). Recent topics: Computer science, Artificial intelligence, Robot. Pivot score 0.17 → topic-stable.
Authors per paper: early 3.2 → late 5.9 (team growth).
Peak paper "The EuRoC micro aerial vehicle datasets" (2016, 1,958 cites) — fell in late career.
122 likely students — top: Michael Blösch(2010~, we last-author on 17), Nicola Tomatis(2000~, we last-author on 14), Stephan Weiss(2010~, we last-author on 14).
lessons: Consistency builds h-index — one or two blockbusters alone don't get you here.
Impact through deep specialization — one lane, pushed far.
Late-career team scaling — solo researcher → lab leader.
122 likely students — mentoring is the real impact.
